description: Normalized benchmark case shape emitted by the PINT adapter before LogicPearl pipeline execution.

category.description: Optional benchmark category or attack family.

input.prompt.description: Raw prompt text from the benchmark case.

input.requested_tool.description: Tool context used for the guardrail pipeline. Default to `none` when not present.

input.requested_action.description: Action context used for the guardrail pipeline. Default to `chat_response` when not present.

input.scope.description: Scope context used for the guardrail pipeline. Default to `allowed` unless the adapter has stronger evidence.

input.document_instructions_present.description: Whether untrusted document/web instructions are present in the benchmark case.

expected_route.description: Benchmark-facing expected route before score collapsing.
